summary: Completed testing of iteration 108 features: Advisor/Client view toggle, PDF Document Generation for Confidence Engine, and Client Portal Layout integration. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed all features working correctly after fixing entityType bug.
seed_data_creation: Demo client data auto-generated by /api/wealth-data/snapshot/demo_client endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 108 features fully tested. Advisor/Client view toggle works correctly - Client view shows simplified UI with 'Your Retirement Readiness' header, 3 metrics cards, 'What You Can Do' recommendations, and 'Contact Advisor' card. Advisor view shows full technical tabs. PDF generation endpoint POST /api/documents/generate/confidence-report returns valid PDF. Fixed entityType undefined bug in generatePdfReport function.

advisor_client_view_toggle.toggle_buttons_exist: PASS - Advisor and Client toggle buttons visible in header with data-testid='view-mode-advisor' and 'view-mode-client'
advisor_client_view_toggle.advisor_view_default: PASS - Advisor view is default, shows technical tabs (Real-Time Modeling, Multi-Scenario, AI Insights, Settings)
advisor_client_view_toggle.client_view_header: PASS - Client view shows 'Your Retirement Readiness' header
advisor_client_view_toggle.client_view_hides_tabs: PASS - Client view hides technical tabs
advisor_client_view_toggle.client_view_metrics: PASS - Shows 3 simplified metrics: Years Until Retirement, Expected Retirement Savings, Years of Retirement
advisor_client_view_toggle.client_view_recommendations: PASS - Shows 'What You Can Do' section with 3 actionable recommendations
advisor_client_view_toggle.client_view_contact_advisor: PASS - Shows 'Contact Advisor' card at bottom with 'Have questions about your retirement plan?' text
advisor_client_view_toggle.toggle_switching: PASS - Can switch between Advisor and Client views

pdf_document_generation.returns_valid_pdf: PASS - Returns application/pdf content type with valid PDF bytes
pdf_document_generation.download_button_exists: PASS - Download PDF button visible with data-testid='generate-pdf-btn'
pdf_document_generation.download_works: PASS - PDF downloads successfully with success toast 'PDF report downloaded successfully!'
pdf_document_generation.pdf_contains_data: PASS - PDF contains confidence score, risk breakdown, projections, and assumptions

client_portal_layout.uses_layout_component: PASS - Client Portal wrapped with Layout component (import on line 2)
client_portal_layout.sidebar_visible: PASS - Sidebar navigation visible with Halcyon Wealth branding
client_portal_layout.navigation_links: PASS - Dashboard, Trading, Finances, Planning, etc. links present
client_portal_layout.client_data_displayed: PASS - Shows Net Worth ($3,040,000), Welcome banner
client_portal_layout.tabs_present: PASS - Overview, Portfolios, Goals, Documents tabs visible

backend_api_tests.confidence_report_pdf_content: PASS - PDF starts with %PDF magic bytes
backend_api_tests.confidence_report_with_ai: PASS - Generates PDF with AI explanation
backend_api_tests.wealth_snapshot: PASS - Returns client_id and assets array

entityType_undefined.issue: entityType variable was used but not defined, causing PDF generation to fail
